subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Maxwell, spoken on 1912-09-06
subcodes.first_line: Children are the ornaments of the home. A home which has no children is like one without light.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اطفال زینت خانه اند منزلی که طفل ندارد مثل اینست که چراغ ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @light and darkness
